quadrant_axes.x: total placements per year (playlist plus editorial adds), reach dimension
quadrant_axes.normalization: per year, each axis is log1p transformed then centered on the year's median and scaled into -1 to 1, so the median maps to 0

meta.placements_unit: adds per year (playlist plus editorial adds)

metrics.rationale: Luma Vale (R&B, North America) shows strong recent momentum and acceleration. Streams are growing 2.4% per week recently and the trend is accelerating. Current weekly streams near 681,163 with 1,387,589 followers.

The Meridian (Rock, Europe) shows strong audience reach and consistency. Streams are growing 0.0% per week recently and the trend is accelerating. Current weekly streams near 1,543,566 with 8,932,490 followers.

Nova Reyes (Pop, North America) shows strong audience reach and acceleration. Streams are growing 0.0% per week recently and the trend is accelerating. Current weekly streams near 983,774 with 4,107,149 followers.

Rio Bravo (Latin, Latin America) shows strong consistency and audience reach. Streams are growing -0.4% per week recently and the trend is accelerating. Current weekly streams near 1,182,065 with 5,503,565 followers.

Kaito Sol (Electronic, Asia) shows strong acceleration and consistency. Streams are growing -0.2% per week recently and the trend is accelerating. Current weekly streams near 352,628 with 1,412,275 followers.

Amara Diop (Afrobeats, Africa) shows strong consistency and audience reach. Streams are growing -0.3% per week recently and the trend is accelerating. Current weekly streams near 652,020 with 1,877,287 followers.

Zephyr Kane (Hip-Hop, North America) shows strong audience reach and consistency. Streams are growing -1.5% per week recently and the trend is accelerating. Current weekly streams near 716,203 with 2,914,141 followers.

Selene Frost (Pop, Europe) shows strong consistency and playlist traction. Streams are growing -1.2% per week recently and the trend is cooling. Current weekly streams near 300,528 with 3,219,646 followers.

Glass Harbor (Indie, Oceania) shows strong playlist traction and audience reach. Streams are growing -2.7% per week recently and the trend is cooling. Current weekly streams near 331,153 with 3,798,371 followers.

Marla Quinn (Country, North America) shows strong audience reach and consistency. Streams are growing -2.4% per week recently and the trend is cooling. Current weekly streams near 694,768 with 4,064,041 followers.

Basslake (Electronic, Europe) shows strong playlist traction and audience reach. Streams are growing -1.7% per week recently and the trend is cooling. Current weekly streams near 277,351 with 1,039,768 followers.

Echo Park Twins (Indie, North America) shows strong playlist traction and consistency. Streams are growing -2.9% per week recently and the trend is cooling. Current weekly streams near 101,106 with 1,677,871 followers.

forecast.model: first order vector autoregression on log yearly totals, fit on the pooled year over year transitions and applied recursively for 10 years
forecast.note: streams and placements predict each other forward, so the two paths co evolve. Every pool artist is forecast forward, and each predicted year is normalized against the field predicted for that year, so a predicted position reflects standing relative to peers and can diverge from the artist's own raw trend when the field moves too.
